title: IDEALS Lab receives NSF grant for AI feedback research
excerpt: The lab was awarded a three-year NSF grant to study generative AI feedback in first-year writing courses.
content: The National Science Foundation has awarded IDEALS Lab a three-year grant to study how generative AI feedback tools affect student revision behavior. The project will follow over 400 students across six sections of first-year writing courses.

title: Alex Chen presents at AERA 2026
excerpt: PhD candidate Alex Chen presented early findings on AI feedback at the American Educational Research Association annual meeting.
content: Alex Chen presented a paper titled 'Revision Patterns Under AI-Generated Feedback' at AERA 2026 in San Antonio, drawing interest from researchers across the learning analytics community.

title: New lab website launched
excerpt: IDEALS Lab has launched a new website to share our research, projects, and team more openly.
content: We're excited to launch our redesigned website, built to make it easier for prospective students, collaborators, and the public to explore our research areas, projects, and publications.
